hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "Automation Project"; echo "Workflows: $(ls workflows/*.json 2>/dev/null | wc -l) exported"; echo "Clients: $(ls -d clients/*/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l) configured"; curl -sf http://localhost:5678/healthz >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "n8n: running" || echo "n8n: not running"'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "rm\s+-rf\s+(workflows|clients|templates)"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"permissionDecision\":\"deny\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"Cannot delete critical automation directories (workflows/, clients/, templates/)\"}}"; exit 0; fi'
